title: From the terror modpack
description: A horror-themed Forge modpack for Minecraft 1.20.1 that transforms the main menu and adds terrifying entities to create a tense and immersive survival experience.
body: From the Terror is a horror modpack for Minecraft 1.20.1 based on Forge. It replaces the main menu with a dark and unsettling interface and adds a set of hostile creatures designed to create an atmosphere of tension and fear. Entities such as the Boiled One, the Knocker, the Grue or the Cave Dweller enhance the survival experience by making exploration more dangerous and unpredictable. This modpack is intended for players who are looking for a horror immersion and a constant challenge in their Minecraft gameplay.
